name: docs-cockpit
description: Single-plugin marketplace for docs-cockpit — markdown to HTML cockpit aggregator + status reporter.

plugins.name: docs-cockpit
plugins.description: Bundle a project's Markdown docs into a single-file HTML cockpit with sidebar nav, kanban, KPI dashboard, read docs/state.json to generate status / progress / standup reports, auto-upgrade itself when CLI is out of date, AND expose /docs-cockpit:build /docs-cockpit:status /docs-cockpit:update slash commands for explicit invocation.
